message.content:
{
  "analysis": "The previous diagnostic pass shows three concrete problems: (1) nginx `/websockify` still returns 400 Bad Request despite config edits, so the WebSocket proxy is not correctly active; (2) direct websockify on 6080 returns 101, so the backend is healthy; (3) QEMU monitor screendumps are 720x400 and entirely black, so the VM has not reached a visible Windows 3.11 desktop. The raw VNC probe also received no framebuffer update and reported a nonsensical size, indicating the RFB parsing was wrong or QEMU VNC is not producing video. I need a clean prompt and then a targeted next action: inspect any hints in /app/isos, restart QEMU with more Windows 3.11-compatible VGA/machine settings (`-vga cirrus`, older machine), capture serial/debug output, fix nginx by fully stopping and starting with a minimal clean config, and verify WebSocket plus screendump after waiting/keystrokes.",
  "plan": "1. Recover a clean prompt and verify current processes/ports/files.
2. Inspect `/app/isos/.gitignore` and disk image hints for any original command expectations.
3. Stop QEMU and restart with compatible settings: `pc-i440fx-2.0`, `-cpu 486`, 64 MB, `-vga cirrus`, snapshot mode, VNC :1, monitor socket, `-display none`, serial file log, no-reboot/no-shutdown to capture boot state.
4. Restart nginx cleanly with a minimal config containing the `$connection_upgrade` map and `/websockify` proxy, then test HTTP and WebSocket upgrade through port 80.
5. Wait for boot, take a QEMU monitor screendump, analyze pixels, send Enter / `win` Enter if needed, wait again, and take another screendump.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "C-c
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "echo CLEAN_$RANDOM
ps -ef | grep -E 'qemu-system-i386|websockify|nginx' | grep -v grep || true
ss -ltnp | grep -E ':(80|6080|5901)\b' || true
ls -l /tmp/qemu-monitor.sock /tmp/qemu-win311.pid /tmp/qemu-win311.log /tmp/qemu-boot.log 2>/dev/null || true
cat /app/isos/.gitignore 2>/dev/null || true
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /etc/nginx/nginx.conf <<'EOF'
user www-data;
worker_processes auto;
pid /run/nginx.pid;

events {
    worker_connections 768;
}

http {
    include /etc/nginx/mime.types;
    default_type application/octet-stream;
    sendfile on;
    keepalive_timeout 65;

    map $http_upgrade $connection_upgrade {
        default upgrade;
        ''      close;
    }

    include /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/*;
}
EOF

cat > /etc/nginx/sites-available/novnc <<'EOF'
server {
    listen 80 default_server;
    server_name _;

    location / {
        root /usr/share/novnc;
        index vnc.html;
        try_files $uri $uri/ =404;
    }

    location /websockify {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:6080;
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header Connection $connection_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_read_timeout 3600s;
        proxy_send_timeout 3600s;
    }
}
EOF

rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default
ln -sf /etc/nginx/sites-available/novnc /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default
nginx -t
pkill -x nginx 2>/dev/null || true
sleep 1
nginx
sleep 1
ps -ef | grep -E 'nginx' | grep -v grep || true
ss -ltnp | grep -E ':(80)\b' || true
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 - <<'PY'
import urllib.request
for url in ['http://localhost:80/vnc.html','http://localhost:80/']:
    try:
        r=urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=3)
        print(url, r.status, r.getheader('Content-Type'), len(r.read(300)))
    except Exception as e:
        print(url, 'ERROR', repr(e))
import http.client, base64, os
conn=http.client.HTTPConnection('localhost', 80, timeout=5)
key=base64.b64encode(os.urandom(16)).decode()
conn.putrequest('GET', '/websockify')
conn.putheader('Host','localhost')
conn.putheader('Upgrade','websocket')
conn.putheader('Connection','Upgrade')
conn.putheader('Sec-WebSocket-Key', key)
conn.putheader('Sec-WebSocket-Version','13')
conn.endheaders()
r=conn.getresponse()
print('websocket', r.status, r.reason, r.getheader('Upgrade'), r.getheader('Connection'), r.getheader('Sec-WebSocket-Accept'))
print('body', r.read(120))
conn.close()
PY
",
      "duration": 1.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "pkill -f 'qemu-system-i386.*win311' 2>/dev/null || true
sleep 1
rm -f /tmp/qemu-monitor.sock /tmp/qemu-win311.pid /tmp/qemu-win311.log /tmp/qemu-boot.log /tmp/win311_cirrus1.ppm
nohup qemu-system-i386 \
  -name win311 \
  -machine pc-i440fx-2.0 \
  -cpu 486 \
  -m 64 \
  -drive file=/app/isos/win311.img,format=raw,if=ide,index=0,media=disk \
  -snapshot \
  -boot c \
  -vga cirrus \
  -vnc :1 \
  -monitor unix:/tmp/qemu-monitor.sock,server,nowait \
  -display none \
  -serial file:/tmp/qemu-boot.log \
  -no-reboot \
  -no-shutdown \
  -pidfile /tmp/qemu-win311.pid \
  > /tmp/qemu-win311.log 2>&1 &
sleep 8
ps -ef | grep -F 'qemu-system-i386' | grep -v grep || true
ss -ltnp | grep -E ':(5901)\b' || true
ls -l /tmp/qemu-monitor.sock /tmp/qemu-win311.pid /tmp/qemu-win311.log /tmp/qemu-boot.log 2>/dev/null || true
tail -80 /tmp/qemu-win311.log 2>/dev/null || true
tail -80 /tmp/qemu-boot.log 2>/dev/null || true
",
      "duration": 3.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /tmp/qemu_probe_cirrus.py <<'PY'
import socket, time, os
sock_path='/tmp/qemu-monitor.sock'
out='/tmp/win311_cirrus1.ppm'
s=socket.socket(socket.AF_UNIX, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
s.settimeout(10)
s.connect(sock_path)
time.sleep(0.2)
print('BANNER:', s.recv(4096).decode(errors='replace').strip())
for cmd in [b'info status\n', b'screendump '+out.encode()+b'\n']:
    s.sendall(cmd)
    time.sleep(3)
    print('---', cmd.decode().strip())
    print(s.recv(8192).decode(errors='replace').strip())
s.close()
print('exists', os.path.exists(out), 'size', os.path.getsize(out) if os.path.exists(out) else 0)
if os.path.exists(out) and os.path.getsize(out)>0:
    with open(out,'rb') as f:
        print('header:', f.read(32))
PY
timeout 20 python3 /tmp/qemu_probe_cirrus.py
python3 - <<'PY'
from collections import Counter
p='/tmp/win311_cirrus1.ppm'
try:
    with open(p,'rb') as f:
        magic=f.readline().strip(); dims=f.readline().strip().split(); maxv=f.readline().strip()
        w,h=map(int,dims); data=f.read()
    pixels=len(data)//3
    c=Counter(); nonblack=0; rsum=gsum=bsum=0
    for i in range(0,len(data),3):
        r,g,b=data[i],data[i+1],data[i+2]
        c[(r,g,b)]+=1
        rsum+=r; gsum+=g; bsum+=b
        if (r,g,b)!=(0,0,0): nonblack+=1
    print('cirrus1 size',w,h,'pixels',pixels,'unique_colors',len(c),'nonblack_pixels',nonblack)
    print('avg_rgb', round(rsum/max(1,pixels),2), round(gsum/max(1,pixels),2), round(bsum/max(1,pixels),2))
    print('top15', c.most_common(15))
    for name,color in [('teal',(0,128,128)),('white',(255,255,255)),('gray192',(192,192,192)),('gray128',(128,128,128)),('green',(0,128,0)),('blue',(0,0,255)),('red',(255,0,0))]:
        print(name, c.get(color,0))
except Exception as e:
    print('ERROR', repr(e))
PY
",
      "duration": 10.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "if [ -S /tmp/qemu-monitor.sock ]; then cat > /tmp/qemu_start_win_cirrus.py <<'PY'
import socket, time, os
sock_path='/tmp/qemu-monitor.sock'
out='/tmp/win311_cirrus2.ppm'
s=socket.socket(socket.AF_UNIX, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
s.settimeout(15)
s.connect(sock_path)
time.sleep(0.2)
print(s.recv(4096).decode(errors='replace').strip())
for cmd in [b'info status\n', b'sendkey ret\n', b'sendkey w\n', b'sendkey i\n', b'sendkey n\n', b'sendkey ret\n']:
    s.sendall(cmd)
    time.sleep(0.8)
    print('CMD', cmd.decode().strip())
    print(s.recv(8192).decode(errors='replace').strip())
print('Waiting 30s...')
time.sleep(30)
s.sendall(b'screendump '+out.encode()+b'\n')
time.sleep(3)
print('--- screendump')
print(s.recv(8192).decode(errors='replace').strip())
s.close()
print('exists', os.path.exists(out), 'size', os.path.getsize(out) if os.path.exists(out) else 0)
PY
timeout 60 python3 /tmp/qemu_start_win_cirrus.py
python3 - <<'PY'
from collections import Counter
p='/tmp/win311_cirrus2.ppm'
try:
    with open(p,'rb') as f:
        magic=f.readline().strip(); dims=f.readline().strip().split(); maxv=f.readline().strip()
        w,h=map(int,dims); data=f.read()
    pixels=len(data)//3
    c=Counter(); nonblack=0; rsum=gsum=bsum=0
    for i in range(0,len(data),3):
        r,g,b=data[i],data[i+1],data[i+2]
        c[(r,g,b)]+=1
        rsum+=r; gsum+=g; bsum+=b
        if (r,g,b)!=(0,0,0): nonblack+=1
    print('cirrus2 size',w,h,'pixels',pixels,'unique_colors',len(c),'nonblack_pixels',nonblack)
    print('avg_rgb', round(rsum/max(1,pixels),2), round(gsum/max(1,pixels),2), round(bsum/max(1,pixels),2))
    print('top15', c.most_common(15))
    for name,color in [('teal',(0,128,128)),('white',(255,255,255)),('gray192',(192,192,192)),('gray128',(128,128,128)),('green',(0,128,0)),('blue',(0,0,255)),('red',(255,0,0))]:
        print(name, c.get(color,0))
except Exception as e:
    print('ERROR', repr(e))
PY
else
  echo 'No QEMU monitor socket; skipping keystroke probe'
fi
",
      "duration": 10.0
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
